title: mentha × vagialis
intro: Mentha × vagialis, also known as Mentha × piperita subsp. vagialis or peppermint × watermint hybrid, is a rare and lesser-known hybrid plant of peppermint (Mentha piperita) and watermint (Mentha aquatica). This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to ease digestive issues and alleviate headaches, due to the presence of menthol and menthone, its primary bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Mentha × vagialis include relieving nausea, reducing inflammation, and improving respiratory function, making it a potential natural remedy for various health conditions. The herbal preparations of Mentha × vagialis can be consumed as a tea, added to skincare products, or used in aromatherapy, taking advantage of its refreshing and invigorating scent.
